description_long: This storage box features a rugged, industrial design with a weathered teal-green metal exterior, reinforced by dark brown corner brackets and metallic bolts. The surface is adorned with yellow warning signs, Japanese text, and a faded hazard symbol, suggesting it is used for storing hazardous or sensitive materials. The box has recessed handles on at least two sides for easy lifting, and a prominent yellow 'WARNING' label on one face. The top appears to be a solid, possibly removable or hinged lid, with visible seams and fasteners. Subtle green stains and corrosion marks add to its utilitarian, well-used appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor or industrial urban environments.
description: A rugged, teal-green metal storage box with reinforced corners, warning labels, and recessed handles, showing signs of wear and corrosion.
description_view_0: Front view shows a recessed handle, yellow Japanese text, and a faded hazard symbol on a weathered teal surface.
description_view_1: This side displays more Japanese text, a central vertical seam, and greenish stains near the bottom, with no visible handle.
description_view_2: The back features a recessed handle and a prominent yellow 'WARNING' label with a striped border, plus corrosion spots.
description_view_3: This side has a central vertical seam, greenish stains, and partial Japanese text, but no handle or warning label.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: painted warning label, Japanese text, hazard symbol
